name: Missing Episodes
description: Scan your Jellyfin library, Sonarr, or TMDB for missing TV episodes and send them to Sonarr.
overview: Finds the gaps in your TV library with three scan sources (Jellyfin virtual items, Sonarr, TMDB) plus a gap-detection fallback, a clean per-show detail view, bulk Sonarr search, an Ignored list, scan history, live progress, and a sidebar entry.

versions.changelog:
- Accuracy: when 'Only monitored' is on, TMDB mode used to count every TMDB-listed episode as expected even if Sonarr had it unmonitored. Now drops unmonitored entries from the missing list during Sonarr enrichment, trimming 'phantom missing' episodes the user never wanted tracked.
- UI: the Jellyfin method explainer now mentions when Sonarr enrichment is active — surfaces the hasFile fallback so it's not invisible magic.

Fix scattered-folder case (TMNT-style): files exist on disk under Sonarr-managed per-season folders that neither Jellyfin's path nor Sonarr's series.Path cover. Enrichment now uses Sonarr's per-episode hasFile flag as ground truth — any missing entry Sonarr knows is already on disk gets dropped, season Have bumps, and series with everything now present fall out of the missing list automatically.

Actually fix the Office/TMNT accuracy bug.
- Root cause: when Jellyfin's cached series.Path was stale (points at an empty folder after files moved) and Sonarr tracked the correct path, my filename parser walked Jellyfin's empty path and returned 0 episodes. Enrichment later overwrote Size/Path with Sonarr's values but by then present/missing counts were already wrong.
- Fix: in Jellyfin-mode scans the plugin now pre-fetches Sonarr's series list (if configured), and when Jellyfin's path has 0 files/0 bytes it retries the parser against Sonarr's path for the same show (matched by TVDB id). The better result wins.
- Added a /debug/parse diagnostic endpoint + scan log line for future debugging.

Real accuracy fix.
- Rewrote ProcessJellyfinSeriesAsync around a clean present/expected separation. Filename-parsed episodes now correctly land in the present set without double-counting with TMDB's expected set.
- Previously: shows like The Office read as 0/186 even though the folder had 144GB of correctly-named S##E## files because filename merge was running AFTER partial stat accumulation and TMDB mode was then double-counting Total. Now stats are computed once, at the end, from |present| and |expected ∪ present|.
- Stale last-result.json from prior versions is naturally overwritten on the first 1.0.4 scan.

Accuracy fix + security hardening.
- Jellyfin scans now walk the series folder and parse S##E## / 1x05 patterns from filenames. Catches episodes that are on disk but Jellyfin's library never imported (was showing shows with 144 GB of files as 0/186).
- XSS hardening: image URLs for posters/backdrops/thumbnails now set via JS with JSON.stringify escaping instead of inline style interpolation — can't break out of the url() literal.
- Large internal refactor: the full Jellyfin scan now delegates per-series to the same helper the rescan-one button uses. No duplicated logic.
- README rewritten with AchievementBadges-style copy-paste install block and security section.

- Progress strip now shows during a single-show rescan (it was hidden because it lived inside the list-view container).
- Click an ignored show to open its detail view; dedicated 'Remove from ignore list' button replaces the old confirm prompt.
- README updated with new features and a note about the harmless 'error occurred while getting plugin details' warning for manually-installed copies.

- Per-show rescan no longer triggers a full library scan in Jellyfin mode (was doing a full scan and returning one entry).
- Rescan now uses Sonarr's tvdbId-indexed series lookup (one call instead of a full dump) and runs under the shared progress tracker, so the UI progress strip fills in during a rescan.
- Size chip moved inside the poster — no longer overlaps the meta row.
- Smarter path reconciliation: prefer Jellyfin's path when its folder has content, fall back to Sonarr when Jellyfin's path is stale / empty.

1.0 release.
- Jellyfin-only library size summing (no Sonarr required for the size chip).
- Clear-history button.
- Rescan single show from the detail view (no full rescan needed).
- Sort by size or by completion progress.
- Prefer Sonarr's series path when available — fixes stale Jellyfin paths.
- All prior 0.2 features.
